headings: h2: Alice Macdonald - Labour & Co-operative MP for Norwich North
text_excerpt: contactmp - Alice Macdonald Skip to content Alice Macdonald MP Home About Campaigns Health Homes Opportunity Fertility Rights Stay In Touch News Events Contact Me Contact Alice HOW CAN ALICE HELP? Parliamentary rules mean Alice can only respond to and support constituents living in Norwich North. We need your email, phone number and address so we can contact you. If you live outside the constituency, you can find your Member of Parliament’s details by visiting http://members.parliament.uk/FindYourMP I live in Norwich North and need help from Alice I'm from a community group, charity or business based in Norwich North and need help from Alice I'm from an organisation or business who is seeking to discuss policy or national/local issues with Alice Something else Consent I give Alice Macdonald permission to contact me using data I've supplied. Opt-out at any time, see my Privacy Policy.
